case_title: KELSTIN GROUP, INC. VS. ARLENE FERNANDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELSTIN GROUP, INC. DBA CREDIT BUREAU ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ARLENE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-05-2017
